title: Nighty Bow
description: A simple, clean bow texture pack that gives the bow a sleek black look and changes the string’s color depending on how charged it is.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/407b2e7065a39d8989742d77cc87d053b65736ec_0.webp) #

🏹 Nighty – Sleek & Dynamic Bow

Nighty is a custom Minecraft texture pack that gives the bow a clean, modern black design while adding a smooth, color-changing string that shifts depending on how charged the bow is. It keeps Minecraft’s simple charm but makes archery feel fresh and satisfying.

Whether you’re practicing your aim, fighting mobs, or battling in PvP, this pack makes every shot look cooler and more polished.


![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/353cbac5fbcd8593141ba19a6e74d3fe4d694c47.png) # ✨ Features - 🎯 Sleek, black retexture of the bow for a clean look. - 🎨 String changes color based on charge level for better visual feedback. - 📏 Minimalistic design that stays true to Minecraft’s vanilla style. - 🧩 Works perfectly in singleplayer or multiplayer. - 🚫 No clutter or distracting details, keeping the focus on gameplay. - 🔄 Lightweight and compatible with most other texture packs. - 📏 Bow size reduced so it doesn’t cover as much of your screen. Perfect for players who want a stylish, modern-looking bow that feels smooth and dynamic without straying from Minecraft’s classic identity. _For further questions, DM polar882 on Discord_

![preview hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5069669d7e3dfe42b1f737078e2deb11a1537cd.png)
